---
title: "blog post title"
description: "a short description"
author:
  - name: Samantha Csik
    url: https://samanthacsik.github.io/
    orcid: 0000-0002-5300-3075
    affiliation: Master of Environmental Data Science Program
    affiliation-url: https://bren.ucsb.edu/masters-programs/master-environmental-data-science
date: 2024-10-18
categories: [Quarto, R, MEDS]
citation: 
  url: https://samanthacsik.github.io/posts/2024-10-18-my-first-post/
image: horst-penguins.png
bibliography: references.bib
csl: plos-computational-biology.csl
# draft: true
# draft-mode: visible
---

## Part 1

I can start writing here!

I'm going to insert a footnote here[^1]. I can also include inline footnotes like this[^2]

[^1]: Here is the associated footnote

[^2]: This is an inline footnote

## Part 2

Did you hear that Openscapes went to the White House [@fenwick2024]??

Let's add a citation here[@gaynor2022]
